qa_pairs.question_text: Where do you currently live? (City and state)
What is your current occupation or primary activity?
What is your approximate monthly household income range?
What is your household composition?
What languages do you primarily consume content in? And for product ads and personal care content, do you prefer the same language or a different one?
How would you describe your personality in 3-5 words?
How comfortable are you trying new brands or products you haven't used before?
How much do you care about how you smell to others throughout the day? Is grooming more about feeling good yourself, or about how others perceive you, or both?
Could you share a moment when you realized your scent made a positive impression on someone else?
How much attention do you pay to how your skin looks and feels on a daily basis?
When buying any personal care product, rank these factors from most to least important:
How important is it to you that a product is 'natural' or 'chemical-free'? And what does 'natural' mean to you in your own words?
Which certifications or labels influence your purchase? Select all that apply.
How do you feel about Indian personal care brands vs. international brands? Do you have a preference or bias?
qa_pairs.answer_text: International brands influence first purchase due to popularity; loyalty driven by personal research/trials

qa_pairs.question_text: What is the maximum premium (%) you would pay for a product that aligns with your values? Rate each separately:
qa_pairs.answer_text: {"Sustainable/eco-friendly packaging":"0","Ayurvedic or traditional ingredients":"0","Clinical-grade, lab-tested formulation":"10_20","Cruelty-free, not tested on animals":"0","Made in India":"10_20"}

qa_pairs.question_text: How loyal are you to personal care brands?
How much do you trust the following sources for personal care product information? Rate each 1-5:
qa_pairs.answer_text: {"TV advertisements":2,"Instagram or YouTube influencers":2,"Dermatologists or skin doctors":4,"Friends and family":3,"Online reviews (Amazon, Nykaa)":4,"Claims written on the product packaging":3}

qa_pairs.question_text: Would you prefer a product that is 'clinically proven' or one that is 'inspired by traditional/Ayurvedic wisdom'? Why?
When your current body wash/soap runs out, what is your typical next step?
Where do you most often buy personal care products? Pick your top 3:
How much do you typically spend on a single body wash purchase?
What would make you switch away from your current body wash? Pick your top 3:
Describe the last time you tried a completely new body wash brand. What triggered the switch? Were you satisfied?
qa_pairs.answer_text: Urgency-driven; bought what was available on q-commerce

qa_pairs.question_text: When shopping online for personal care, what do you look at first? Pick your top 3:
Do you use quick commerce (Blinkit, Zepto, Swiggy Instamart) for personal care? If yes, does the limited selection change what you buy?
qa_pairs.answer_text: Yes; limited selection sometimes affects pricier purchases like shampoo

qa_pairs.question_text: If a brand you liked raised its price by 30%, what would you do?
How many times a day do you typically shower/bathe?
Walk me through your typical bathing routine step by step. What products do you use and in what order?
qa_pairs.answer_text: Medicated shampoo then body wash then face wash

qa_pairs.question_text: Do you currently use body wash, bar soap, or both? What drives that choice?
How would you describe your relationship with bathing/grooming?
What specific skin concerns, if any, do you have? Select all that apply.
Do other household members use the same body wash as you? Who decides what to buy?
How does your water quality affect your product choices, if at all?
Has your bathing routine changed in the last 2 years? If so, how and why?
What fragrance families do you naturally gravitate toward? Pick your top 2:
Name a specific product whose fragrance you loved. Did you repurchase it because of the scent? What made that fragrance special to you?
qa_pairs.answer_text: Fiama lavender body wash Ñ scent matches packaging expectation, delivers exactly what it promises; not fancy but great value

qa_pairs.question_text: How long should a body wash fragrance last on your skin?
How important is lather/foam to your body wash experience?
What texture do you prefer in a body wash?
What is your ideal post-wash skin feeling?
Do you prefer packaging that looks:
If you could combine the fragrance of one product with the texture of another, what would your ideal combination be?
What body wash brand(s) do you currently use? List all.
What do you like MOST about your current body wash? (Top 1-2 things)
What, if anything, frustrates you or feels 'just okay' about your current body wash?
What body wash brands can you name off the top of your head? List as many as you can.
How would you categorize body washes in your mind? What makes one different from another?
Have you tried any of these newer/D2C body wash brands? Rate your experience for any you've used:
qa_pairs.answer_text: {"mCaffeine (coffee-based)":3,"Beardo (men's grooming)":3,"Bombay Shaving Company (men's, premium)":3,"Mamaearth (natural, toxin-free)":3,"The Man Company (men's grooming)":4,"Minimalist (clinical, transparent bottles)":4,"Dot & Key (colorful, K-beauty style)":4}

qa_pairs.question_text: If you could design your PERFECT body wash from scratch, describe it. Think about fragrance, texture, benefit, packaging, price â anything.
What claims or product descriptions on a body wash would make you stop and read more? Pick top 3:
What is the most you have ever paid for a body wash? What was it and was it worth it?
Would you be interested in a body wash specifically formulated for Indian skin types and hard water conditions?
What aspects of a body wash designed for Indian skin and hard water would be most important to you?
Could you share how a body wash could help with tanning specifically in the context of Indian skin and hard water?
What would a body wash need to offer for you to pay 2x your current price?
Where do you typically discover new personal care products? Pick your top 3:
Who do you follow or trust in the personal care space on social media? Name specific ones and what makes you trust them.
Have you ever bought a personal care product because you saw it on social media? Describe what happened.
qa_pairs.answer_text: Wow face wash with attached brush Ñ brush novelty drove purchase

qa_pairs.question_text: What type of content makes you most likely to try a new product? Pick top 2:
Do you read online reviews before buying personal care products? Where?
If a friend recommends a body wash to you, how likely are you to try it vs. researching it yourself first?
